reasoning_summary: The Refugee Aid Assistant has demonstrated a high risk of operational and system breaches, particularly regarding bias and privacy.

detected_risks.description: The assistant may perpetuate or amplify existing biases in its responses.
detected_risks.mitigation: Implementing fairness algorithms and data auditing processes.

detected_risks.description: The assistant may collect sensitive information without adequate safeguards or consent.
detected_risks.mitigation: Implementing encryption for sensitive data and obtaining explicit user consent.

recommended_action: Conduct a thorough risk assessment and implement additional fairness algorithms, data encryption, and privacy controls to mitigate the detected risks.
